channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How AI, crypto and AIPAC are ending political careers
item.description: AI firms, cryptocurrency industry, and pro-Israel groups are spending heavily to defeat their least favorite members of Congress and influence elections.

item.title: Inside the Democratic resistance on AI
item.description: Progressive Democrats are increasingly vocal in their opposition to AI. Five key figures are shaping a confrontational stance.

item.title: "The pitchforks are here": Billionaires work to contain AI's populist revolt
item.description: U.S. billionaires are crafting their own solutions to AI-driven inequality, aiming to head off a populist backlash against their growing wealth.

item.title: Vance says U.S. and Iran are "very close" to a deal
item.description: Vice President JD Vance stated Thursday that the U.S. and Iran are nearing a memorandum of understanding to extend the ceasefire.
